economic_notes: Four wholly-owned subsidiaries: Colchester Holdings Ltd., 1560750 Alberta Ltd. (Bobtail Construction), Akamihk Kanataskiy Ventures Ltd. (AKV), Akamihk Energy Incorporated (AEI), and MFN Management Inc. Subsidiaries accounted for by equity method. Combined subsidiary revenues approx $9.1M. Treaty land entitlement negotiation ongoing (ATB loan for legal fees).
notes: Fiscal year is March 31, 2023 (not 2024). Subsidiaries (Colchester Holdings Ltd., 1560750 Alberta Ltd./Bobtail Construction, AKV, AEI, MFN Management Inc.) are accounted for by equity method rather than full consolidation - investment in controlled entities shown as $9,643,175 on balance sheet. Annual surplus per Statement of Change in Net Financial Assets is $4,095,294 (includes $2,134,902 enterprise surplus and $97,262 trust fund royalties not in operating statement). Operating statement shows excess of revenue over expenditures of $1,863,130. Long-term debt includes bank loan of $493,193 plus mortgages of $418,336. No schedule of remuneration for Chief, Council or staff provided. Total government transfers estimated as ISC $12,871,714 + ASETS $579,841 + CMHC $117,274 + Health Canada $2,850,966 + FNDF $595,300 = $17,015,095 less deferred adjustments applied per net revenue presentation.
